summary: 373 tests passed, 97.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: All imports in smoke test succeed without errors
completion_promises.evidence: Created 8 re-export shim modules (agents/orchestrator.py, agents/implementer.py, agents/evaluator.py, agents/builder.py, tools/analyse_context.py, tools/plan_pipeline.py, tools/execute_command.py, tools/verify_output.py) so that the smoke test import paths from the spec all resolve correctly. Ran the full smoke test script and all imports succeed. TestSmokeTestImports class (11 tests) validates each import.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Config file loads and contains required model keys
completion_promises.evidence: orchestrator-config.yaml loads via yaml.safe_load and contains orchestrator.reasoning_model and orchestrator.implementation_model keys. TestConfigLoading class (5 tests) validates this including that models are different strings.
domains/example-domain/DOMAIN.md exists, is readable as UTF-8, and contains domain guidelines. TestDomainLoading class (3 tests) validates existence, readability, and content.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All tools are importable and are BaseTool instances
completion_promises.evidence: All four tools (analyse_context, plan_pipeline, execute_command, verify_output) are importable from both tools.orchestrator_tools and individual shim modules, and all are BaseTool instances. TestToolsAreBaseTool class (5 tests) validates this.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All prompts are importable and are non-empty strings
completion_promises.evidence: ORCHESTRATOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT, IMPLEMENTER_SYSTEM_PROMPT, and EVALUATOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT are all importable from the prompts package and are non-empty strings (>100 chars each). TestPromptsAreNonEmpty class (3 tests) validates this.

completion_promises.criterion_text: agent.py module-level agent variable is a CompiledStateGraph
completion_promises.evidence: agent.py exports a module-level 'agent' variable that is an instance of langgraph.graph.state.CompiledStateGraph. TestAgentEntrypoint class (2 tests) validates attribute existence and type.
evaluator_subagent() returns a SubAgent dict with 'tools' key set to an empty list []. TestEvaluatorNoTools class (1 test) validates the key exists, is a list, and is empty.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Builder async subagent has graph_id field
completion_promises.evidence: builder_async_subagent() returns an AsyncSubAgent dict containing a 'graph_id' key with a non-empty string value. TestBuilderGraphId class (1 test) validates this.

completion_promises.criterion_text: File tree matches spec Section 7 (all expected files exist)
completion_promises.evidence: All 26 expected files verified to exist via parametrized TestFileTree class. Created missing files: README.md, 4 agent shim modules (orchestrator.py, implementer.py, evaluator.py, builder.py), 4 tool shim modules (analyse_context.py, plan_pipeline.py, execute_command.py, verify_output.py).

completion_promises.criterion_text: No import errors across the entire project
completion_promises.evidence: All 17 project modules import without errors (agent, agents, agents.agents, agents.orchestrator, agents.implementer, agents.evaluator, agents.builder, tools, tools.orchestrator_tools, tools.analyse_context, tools.plan_pipeline, tools.execute_command, tools.verify_output, prompts, prompts.orchestrator_prompts, prompts.implementer_prompts, prompts.evaluator_prompts). TestNoImportErrors class (17 parametrized tests) validates this.

completion_promises.criterion_text: langgraph.json is valid JSON and references ./agent.py:agent
completion_promises.evidence: langgraph.json exists, is valid JSON, and its graphs.orchestrator value is './agent.py:agent'. TestLanggraphJson class (3 tests) validates existence, JSON validity, and the correct reference.
